stages.expected: Extract task, domain, explicit constraints, supplied-paper roles and unknowns; separate verified, inferred, proposed and unknown facts.
Search baseline, gap, parallel-method, strong-comparison and risk evidence before choosing a stitch.
Use title/keyword filtering, abstract semantic review and full-text checks for core evidence; existence alone is not relevance.
Ask at most two questions that materially change baseline or experiment selection; never ask the user to design the method.
Freeze reproducible code/version, data split, metrics, compute assumptions and a disabled-module parity path.
State condition, limitation, mechanism, intervention, target metric and guardrail as a falsifiable hypothesis.
Record provenance, semantics, interfaces, optimization interaction, cost and failure modes; shape-only compatibility is insufficient.
Recommend the smallest testable A+B or A+B+C plan, adding one causal factor at a time.
Define fair baselines, strong comparisons, ablations, seeds, uncertainty, resource metrics and stop conditions.
Return GO, REVISE, REVISE_TO_PILOT or NO_GO with missing evidence and a recovery path.

global_hard_failures: fabricated paper, identifier, result, code availability or reproduced metric
verified DOI treated as proof of relevance
supplied paper forced into an incompatible role
stronger baselines or negative results hidden
success decision without reproducible baseline and falsifiable hypothesis
